changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between study_event_definition and module_study_event_definition
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_study_event_def_to_module ON study_event_definition; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_study_event_def_to_module_study_event_def();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between study_event and module_study_event
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_study_event_to_module ON study_event; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_study_event_to_module_study_event();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between event_crf and module_event_crf
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_event_crf_to_module ON event_crf; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_event_crf_to_module_event_crf();
